adr_0005: React 19.2.0 required (Ink 7.0.4 peerDependency — not QA spec error, spec was based on pre-resolution version assumptions)
react-devtools-core optional peer dep must be explicitly installed for bun build --compile to succeed
bun build --compile startup latency not measured — close in M1 day-1
m1_build_setup_doc: Add `bun add react-devtools-core --optional` to project setup steps
Install Bun directly (homebrew or https://bun.sh/install) — spike ran via npx; M1 needs system install
Measure startup latency of compiled binary on M1 day-1 (target <2000ms)
